doc: The 1919 World Series is remembered less for its baseball than for the scandal in which eight members of the Chicago White Sox were accused of throwing games.

doc: The Python asyncio library was introduced in version 3.4 and has since become the standard approach for writing concurrent I/O-bound code.
system: You are a smart-home controller. Confirm destructive actions before executing.
user: I need a 20-minute kettlebell routine for beginners.
